DECLARATION OF COUNSEL IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO COMPEL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIGUISEPPI, MICHAEL

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT RUSSELL GOODROW'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH COURT ORDER AND PAYMENT OF MISSED IME APPOINTMENT FEE AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH COURT ORDER, PAYMENT OF MISSED IME APPOINTMENT FEE, AND MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AS TO THE IME FEE AND DENIED AS TO THE OTHER ISSUES. MR. BELLI FAILED TO EXPLAIN WHY HE SHOULD NOT PAY FOR THE IME FEE. THE CORRECT PROCEDURE TO SEEK COMPLIANCE WITH A COURT IS NOT TO SEEK ANOTHER ORDER CONFIRMING THE FIRST ORDER, BUT TO SEEK AN ORDER OF CONTEMPT. SANCTIONS AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $750.00 PLUS THE FEE FOR IME. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-11-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Court Order And Payment Of Missed Ime Appointment Fee And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT RUSSELL GOODROW'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH COURT ORDER AND PAYMENT OF MISSED IME APPOINTMENT FEE AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Owen T. Rooney, Esq. of Edrington, Schirmer & Murphy 925/827-3300 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified - Defendant's motion to compel compliance with court order, payment of missed IME appointment fee, and monetary sanctions is granted as to the IME fee and denied as to the other issues. Mr. Belli failed to explain why he should not pay for the IME fee. The correct procedure to seek compliance with a court is not to seek another order confirming the first order, but to seek an order of contempt. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $750.00 plus the fee for IME. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
